other_observers: Ted Floyd, Kathanne Lynch, Toni Rautus, Debra Sparn, Kathy and Tom Waters
specific_location: 4 miles north of Mancos on CR 41; 1 mile north of Bauer Lake
description: Warbler-sized bird with longish black and white fanned tail (white outer tail feathers), black head and upperparts with broad white panel in wings, black chest, crimson red belly; small thin black bill.Behavior: Flitting about branches high in a Ponderosa Pine with wings hanging down from body and tail fanned.Call: nonePlumage: adult
